chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-276 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 11-09-2025 Mr. Ashique Hussain Kalhoro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General. -------- This is 2nd round of litigation, petitioner had filed petition No.329/2020, seeking recovery of his missing son Ayaz Ahmed. The said petition was disposed of by this court vide orders dated 17-07-2025. The petitioner after the lapse of about one month has again filed this petition. The earlier petition was disposed of with following observations:- “In view of above, it appears that after lodging of FIR and submission of challan, it is the criminal court to proceed with the case and decide the matter in accordance with law and this court needs no interference in the smooth process of trial. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby disposed of”. Since no fresh ground is available to the petitioner to file this petition within a span of one month’s time, therefore, issuance of process to the police would be nothing but wastage of time. This petition, therefore, is disposed of, the petitioner may pursue his case before the trial court where pursuant to the registration of FIR challan was submitted and accused were facing trial. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
